block.name: Corrected verification — #195 Elmer test_hook rewrite (4 stale tests against old API)
acceptance_criteria: #195: Elmer baseline established — full test suite run documented before asserting hook tests
#195: No AttributeError or KeyError failures in hook tests (old API surface gone)

never: Do NOT modify any files — this is a verification-only spec
Do NOT touch NeuroGraph, Praxis, QuantumGraph, agent-zero, or any other repo
Do NOT skip the baseline step — pre-existing failures must be documented before asserting hook test results
anti_drift: Two steps: baseline run then targeted hook test run. Nothing else.

steps.description: #195 — Run full Elmer test suite to establish baseline. Documents any pre-existing failures (e.g. #205 SocketManager duplicate registration in test_start_stop) so they are not counted against the hook rewrite.
#195 — Run test_hook.py specifically. All 8 rewritten tests must pass. These tests were rewritten against the current ElmerHook API (nested module_results, removed get_context, current stats keys).
Confirm: full Elmer suite baseline documented, test_hook.py runs 8 tests all passing, no AttributeError or KeyError in hook test output.
